original_image_tags: The document is a typed letter on FBI letterhead, yellowed with age. There are two hole-punches at the top. The paper has several handwritten annotations in blue, red, and black ink. The signature "J. Edgar Hoover" is typed. The overall condition is fair, with some edge wear.

elements.description: A typed letter on FBI letterhead, dated October 17, 1966, addressed to Mr. Paul L. Wright in Atlanta, Georgia. The letter states that UFO sightings are not within the FBI's jurisdiction and refers the matter to the Department of the Air Force. It includes a typed note at the bottom regarding prior correspondence and several handwritten initials and signatures at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page is a typed letter on FBI letterhead with visual elements (handwritten annotations/initials/signatures), but Description B adds specific content details (date, addressee, UFO topic) not mentioned by Description A without contradiction.
